ayahs.textUthmani: قٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْمَجِيدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قٓ‌ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْمَجِيدِ ١
ayahs.textIndopak: قٓ ۚ وَالۡقُرۡاٰنِ الۡمَجِيۡدِۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Qāf. By the honored Qur’ān...
ayahs.transliteration: Qaaaf; wal-Qur-aanil Majeed

ayahs.textUthmani: بَلْ عَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَقَالَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا شَىْءٌ عَجِيبٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلْ عَجِبُوٓاْ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَقَالَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا شَىْءٌ عَجِيبٌ ٢
ayahs.textIndopak: بَلۡ عَجِبُوۡۤا اَنۡ جَآءَهُمۡ مُّنۡذِرٌ مِّنۡهُمۡ فَقَالَ الۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ هٰذَا شَىۡءٌ عَجِيۡبٌ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: But they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves, and the disbelievers say, "This is an amazing thing.
ayahs.transliteration: Bal 'ajibooo an jaa'ahum munzirum minhum faqaalal kaafiroona haazaa shai'un 'ajeeb

ayahs.textUthmani: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا ۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجْعٌۢ بَعِيدٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا‌ۖ ذَٲلِكَ رَجْعُۢ بَعِيدٌ ٣
ayahs.textIndopak: ءَاِذَا مِتۡنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا ​ۚ ذٰ لِكَ رَجۡعٌ ۢ بَعِيۡدٌ‏
ayahs.translation: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant [i.e., unlikely] return."
ayahs.transliteration: A-izaa mitnaa Wa-kunnaa turaaban zaalika raj'um ba'eed

ayahs.textUthmani: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَـٰبٌ حَفِيظٌۢ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ‌ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَـٰبٌ حَفِيظُۢ ٤
ayahs.textIndopak: قَدۡ عَلِمۡنَا مَا تَنۡقُصُ الۡاَرۡضُ مِنۡهُمۡ​ۚ وَعِنۡدَنَا كِتٰبٌ حَفِيۡظٌ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: We know what the earth diminishes [i.e., consumes] of them, and with Us is a retaining record.
ayahs.transliteration: Qad 'alimnaa maa tanqu-sul ardu minhum Wa-'indanaa Kitaabun Hafeez

ayahs.textUthmani: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ فَهُمْ فِىٓ أَمْرٍ مَّرِيجٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلْ كَذَّبُواْ بِٱلْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ فَهُمْ فِىٓ أَمْرٍ مَّرِيجٍ ٥
ayahs.textIndopak: بَلۡ كَذَّبُوۡا بِالۡحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمۡ فَهُمۡ فِىۡۤ اَمۡرٍ مَّرِيۡجٍ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: But they denied the truth when it came to them, so they are in a confused condition.
ayahs.transliteration: Bal kazzaboo bilhaqqi lammaa jaaa'ahum fahum feee amrim mareej

ayahs.textUthmani: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوٓاْ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍ ٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اَ فَلَمۡ يَنۡظُرُوۡۤا اِلَى السَّمَآءِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ كَيۡفَ بَنَيۡنٰهَا وَزَ يَّـنّٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِنۡ فُرُوۡجٍ‏
ayahs.translation: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts?
ayahs.transliteration: Afalam yanzurooo ilas samaaa'i fawqahum kaifa banainaahaa Wa-zaiyannaahaa Wa-maa lahaa min furooj

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۭ بَهِيجٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٲسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجِۭ بَهِيجٍ ٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَالۡاَرۡضَ مَدَدۡنٰهَا وَاَ لۡقَيۡنَا فِيۡهَا رَوَاسِىَ وَاَنۡۢبَتۡنَا فِيۡهَا مِنۡ كُلِّ زَوۡجٍۢ بَهِيۡجٍ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind,
ayahs.transliteration: Wal-arda madadnaahaa Wa-alqainaa feehaa rawaasiya Wa-ambatnaa feehaa min kulli zawjim baheej

ayahs.textUthmani: تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ ٨
ayahs.textIndopak: تَبۡصِرَةً وَّذِكۡرٰى لِكُلِّ عَبۡدٍ مُّنِيۡبٍ‏
ayahs.translation: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allāh].
ayahs.transliteration: Tabsiratanw Wa-zikraa likulli 'abdim muneeb

ayahs.textUthmani: وَنَزَّلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً مُّبَـٰرَكًا فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَحَبَّ ٱلْحَصِيدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنَزَّلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً مُّبَـٰرَكًا فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَحَبَّ ٱلْحَصِيدِ ٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَنَزَّلۡنَا مِنَ السَّمَآءِ مَآءً مُّبٰـرَكًا فَاَنۡۢبَـتۡـنَا بِهٖ جَنّٰتٍ وَّحَبَّ الۡحَصِيۡدِ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And We have sent down blessed rain from the sky and made grow thereby gardens and grain from the harvest
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-nazzalnaa minas samaaa'i maaa'am mubaarakan fa-ambatnaa bihee jannaatinw Wa-habbal haseed

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَـٰتٍ لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَـٰتٍ لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ ١٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَالنَّخۡلَ بٰسِقٰتٍ لَّهَا طَلۡـعٌ نَّضِيۡدٌ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers -
ayahs.transliteration: Wannakhla baasiqaatil laha tal'un nadeed

ayahs.textUthmani: رِّزْقًا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: رِّزْقًا لِّلْعِبَادِ‌ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا‌ۚ كَذَٲلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ ١١
ayahs.textIndopak: رِّزۡقًا لِّلۡعِبَادِ​ ۙ وَاَحۡيَيۡنَا بِهٖ بَلۡدَةً مَّيۡـتًا​ ؕ كَذٰلِكَ الۡخُـرُوۡجُ‏
ayahs.translation: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the emergence [i.e., resurrection].
ayahs.transliteration: Rizqal lil'ibaad, Wa-ahyainaa bihee baldatam maitaa; kazaalikal khurooj

ayahs.textUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ ١٢
ayahs.textIndopak: كَذَّبَتۡ قَبۡلَهُمۡ قَوۡمُ نُوۡحٍ وَّاَصۡحٰبُ الرَّسِّ وَثَمُوۡدُۙ‏
ayahs.translation: The people of Noah denied before them, and the companions of the well and Thamūd
ayahs.transliteration: Kazzabat qablahum qawmu Noohinw Wa-Ashaabur Rassi Wa-Samood

ayahs.textUthmani: وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ وَإِخْوَٰنُ لُوطٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ وَإِخْوَٲنُ لُوطٍ ١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَعَادٌ وَّفِرۡعَوۡنُ وَاِخۡوَانُ لُوۡطٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And ʿAad and Pharaoh and the brothers [i.e., people] of Lot
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-'Aadunw Wa-Fir'awnu wikhwaanu loot

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ وَقَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ ۚ كُلٌّ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ وَقَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ‌ۚ كُلٌّ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ ١٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّاَصۡحٰبُ الۡاَيۡكَةِ وَقَوۡمُ تُبَّعٍ​ؕ كُلٌّ كَذَّبَ الرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيۡدِ‏
ayahs.translation: And the companions of the thicket and the people of Tubbaʿ. All denied the messengers, so My threat was justly fulfilled.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-Ashaabul Aykati Wa-qawmu Tubba'; kullun kazzabar Rusula fahaqqa wa'eed

ayahs.textUthmani: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى لَبْسٍ مِّنْ خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ‌ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى لَبْسٍ مِّنْ خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ ١٥
ayahs.textIndopak: اَفَعَيِيۡنَا بِالۡخَـلۡقِ الۡاَوَّلِ​ؕ بَلۡ هُمۡ فِىۡ لَبۡسٍ مِّنۡ خَلۡقٍ جَدِيۡدٍ‏
ayahs.translation: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation.
ayahs.transliteration: Afa'a-yeenaa bilkhalqil awwal; bal hum fee labsim min khalqin jadeed

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ‌ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ ١٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا الۡاِنۡسَانَ وَنَعۡلَمُ مَا تُوَسۡوِسُ بِهٖ نَفۡسُهٗ ۖۚ وَنَحۡنُ اَقۡرَبُ اِلَيۡهِ مِنۡ حَبۡلِ الۡوَرِيۡدِ‏
ayahs.translation: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad khalaqnal insaana Wa-na'lamu maa tuwaswisu bihee nafsuhoo Wa-Nahnu aqrabu ilaihi min hablil wareed

ayahs.textUthmani: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌ ١٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اِذۡ يَتَلَقَّى الۡمُتَلَقِّيٰنِ عَنِ الۡيَمِيۡنِ وَعَنِ الشِّمَالِ قَعِيۡدٌ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: When the two receivers [i.e., recording angels] receive, seated on the right and on the left.
ayahs.transliteration: Iz yatalaqqal mutalaqqi-yaani 'anil yameeni Wa-'anish shimaali qa'eed

ayahs.textUthmani: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ ١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: مَا يَلۡفِظُ مِنۡ قَوۡلٍ اِلَّا لَدَيۡهِ رَقِيۡبٌ عَتِيۡدٌ‏
ayahs.translation: He [i.e., man] utters no word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record].
ayahs.transliteration: Maa yalfizu min qawlin illaa ladaihi raqeebun 'ateed

ayahs.textUthmani: وَجَآءَتْ سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَآءَتْ سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ بِٱلْحَقِّ‌ۖ ذَٲلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ ١٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَ جَآءَتۡ سَكۡرَةُ الۡمَوۡتِ بِالۡحَـقِّ​ؕ ذٰلِكَ مَا كُنۡتَ مِنۡهُ تَحِيۡدُ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-jaaa'at sakratul mawti bilhaqq; zaalika maa kunta minhu taheed

ayahs.textUthmani: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْوَعِيدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ‌ۚ ذَٲلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْوَعِيدِ ٢٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَنُفِخَ فِى الصُّوۡرِ ​ؕ ذٰ لِكَ يَوۡمُ الۡوَعِيۡدِ‏
ayahs.translation: And the Horn will be blown. That is the Day of [carrying out] the threat.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-nufikha fis Soor; zaalika yawmul wa'eed

ayahs.textUthmani: وَجَآءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌ وَشَهِيدٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَآءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌ وَشَهِيدٌ ٢١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَجَآءَتۡ كُلُّ نَفۡسٍ مَّعَهَا سَآٮِٕقٌ وَّشَهِيۡدٌ‏
ayahs.translation: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-jaaa'at kullu nafsim ma'ahaa saaa'iqunw Wa-shaheed

ayahs.textUthmani: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ ٢٢
ayahs.textIndopak: لَقَدۡ كُنۡتَ فِىۡ غَفۡلَةٍ مِّنۡ هٰذَا فَكَشَفۡنَا عَنۡكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ الۡيَوۡمَ حَدِيۡدٌ‏
ayahs.translation: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp."
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad kunta fee ghaf-latim min haazaa fakashafnaa 'anka ghitaaa'aka fabasarukal yawma hadeed

ayahs.textUthmani: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَـٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَـٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ ٢٣
ayahs.textIndopak: وَقَالَ قَرِيۡـنُهٗ هٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيۡدٌ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared."
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-qaala qareenuhoo haazaa maa ladaiya 'ateed

ayahs.textUthmani: أَلْقِيَا فِى جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: أَلْقِيَا فِى جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اَلۡقِيَا فِىۡ جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيۡدٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: [Allāh will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever,
ayahs.transliteration: Alqiyaa fee Jahannama kulla kaffaarin 'aneed

ayahs.textUthmani: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ مُّرِيبٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ مُّرِيبٍ ٢٥
ayahs.textIndopak: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلۡخَيۡرِ مُعۡتَدٍ مُّرِيۡبِ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter,
ayahs.transliteration: Mannaa'il lilkhayri mu'tadim mureeb

ayahs.textUthmani: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ ٢٦
ayahs.textIndopak: اۨلَّذِىۡ جَعَلَ مَعَ اللّٰهِ اِلٰهًا اٰخَرَ فَاَ لۡقِيٰهُ فِى الۡعَذَابِ الشَّدِيۡدِ‏
ayahs.translation: Who made [as equal] with Allāh another deity; then throw him into the severe punishment."
ayahs.transliteration: Allazee ja'ala ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara fa-alqiyaahu fil 'azaabish shadeed

ayahs.textUthmani: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطْغَيْتُهُۥ وَلَـٰكِن كَانَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطْغَيْتُهُۥ وَلَـٰكِن كَانَ فِى ضَلَـٰلِۭ بَعِيدٍ ٢٧
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ قَرِيۡنُهٗ رَبَّنَا مَاۤ اَطۡغَيۡتُهٗ وَلٰـكِنۡ كَانَ فِىۡ ضَلٰلٍۢ بَعِيۡدٍ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error."
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala qareenuhoo Rabbanaa maaa atghaituhoo Wa-laakin kaana fee dalaalin ba'eed

ayahs.textUthmani: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا۟ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُواْ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ ٢٨
ayahs.textIndopak: قَالَ لَا تَخۡتَصِمُوۡا لَدَىَّ وَقَدۡ قَدَّمۡتُ اِلَيۡكُمۡ بِالۡوَعِيۡدِ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: [Allāh] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the threat [i.e., warning].
ayahs.transliteration: Qaala laa takhtasimoo ladaayya Wa-qad qaddamtu ilaikum bilwa'eed

ayahs.textUthmani: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّـٰمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۟ بِظَلَّـٰمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ ٢٩
ayahs.textIndopak: مَا يُبَدَّلُ الۡقَوۡلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَاۤ اَنَا بِظَلَّامٍ لِّلۡعَبِيۡدِ‏
ayahs.translation: The word [i.e., decree] will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants."
ayahs.transliteration: Maa yubaddalul qawlu ladaiya Wa-maaa ana bizal-laamil lil'abeed

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍ ٣٠
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ نَـقُوۡلُ لِجَهَـنَّمَ هَلِ امۡتَلَـئْتِ وَتَقُوۡلُ هَلۡ مِنۡ مَّزِيۡدٍ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: On the Day We will say to Hell, "Have you been filled?" and it will say, "Are there some more,"
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma naqoolu li'jahannama halim talaati Wa-taqoolu hal mim mazeed

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاُزۡلِفَتِ الۡجَـنَّةُ لِلۡمُتَّقِيۡنَ غَيۡرَ بَعِيۡدٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far,
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-uzlifatil jannatu lil-muttaqeena ghaira ba'eed

ayahs.textUthmani: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍ ٣٢
ayahs.textIndopak: هٰذَا مَا تُوۡعَدُوۡنَ لِكُلِّ اَوَّابٍ حَفِيۡظٍ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allāh] and keeper [of His covenant].
ayahs.transliteration: Haaza maa too'adoona likulli awwaabin hafeez

ayahs.textUthmani: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ ٣٣
ayahs.textIndopak: مَنۡ خَشِىَ الرَّحۡمٰنَ بِالۡغَيۡبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلۡبٍ مُّنِيۡبِۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Who feared the Most Merciful in the unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance].
ayahs.transliteration: Man khashiyar Rahmaana bilghaibi Wa-jaaa'a biqalbim muneeb

ayahs.textUthmani: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُلُودِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ‌ۖ ذَٲلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُلُودِ ٣٤
ayahs.textIndopak: اۨدۡخُلُوۡهَا بِسَلٰمٍ​ؕ ذٰلِكَ يَوۡمُ الۡخُلُوۡدِ‏
ayahs.translation: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity."
ayahs.transliteration: Udkhuloohaa bisalaamin zaalika yawmul khulood

ayahs.textUthmani: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ ٣٥
ayahs.textIndopak: لَهُمۡ مَّا يَشَآءُوۡنَ فِيۡهَا وَلَدَيۡنَا مَزِيۡدٌ‏
ayahs.translation: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more.
ayahs.transliteration: Lahum maa yashaaa'oona feehaa Wa-ladainaa mazeed

ayahs.textUthmani: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا فَنَقَّبُوا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا فَنَقَّبُواْ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ ٣٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَكَمۡ اَهۡلَـكۡنَا قَبۡلَهُمۡ مِّنۡ قَرۡنٍ هُمۡ اَشَدُّ مِنۡهُمۡ بَطۡشًا فَنَقَّبُوۡا فِى الۡبِلَادِ ؕ هَلۡ مِنۡ مَّحِيۡصٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And how many a generation before them did We destroy who were greater than them in [striking] power and had explored throughout the lands. Is there any place of escape?
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-kam ahlaknaa qablahum min qarnin hum ashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fil bilaad, hal mim mahees

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّ فِى ذَٲلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ ٣٧
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّ فِىۡ ذٰلِكَ لَذِكۡرٰى لِمَنۡ كَانَ لَهٗ قَلۡبٌ اَوۡ اَلۡقَى السَّمۡعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيۡدٌ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind].
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee zaalika lazikraa liman kaana lahoo qalbun aw alqas sam'a Wa-huwa shaheed

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٲتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ ٣٨
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَقَدۡ خَلَقۡنَا السَّمٰوٰتِ وَالۡاَرۡضَ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا فِىۡ سِتَّةِ اَيَّامٍ​ۖ وَّمَا مَسَّنَا مِنۡ لُّغُوۡبٍ‏
ayahs.translation: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laqad khalaqnas samaawaati wal-arda Wa-maa bainahumaa fee sittati ayyaamin Wa-maa massanaa mil lughoob

ayahs.textUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ ٣٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاصۡبِرۡ عَلٰى مَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوۡعِ الشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ الۡغُرُوۡبِ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: So be patient, [O Muḥammad], over what they say and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting,
ayahs.transliteration: Fasbir 'alaa maa yaqooloona Wa-sabbih bihamdi Rabbika qabla tuloo'ish shamsi Wa-qablal ghuroob

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَـٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَـٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ ٤٠
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمِنَ الَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَاَدۡبَارَ السُّجُوۡدِ‏
ayahs.translation: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration [i.e., prayer].
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-minal laili fasabbih-hu Wa-adbaaras sujood

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ ٱلْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍ قَرِيبٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ ٱلْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍ قَرِيبٍ ٤١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاسۡتَمِعۡ يَوۡمَ يُنَادِ الۡمُنَادِ مِنۡ مَّكَانٍ قَرِيۡبٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And listen on the Day when the Caller will call out from a place that is near -
ayahs.transliteration: Wastami' yawma yunaa-dil munaadi mim makaanin qareeb

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيْحَةَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُرُوجِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيْحَةَ بِٱلْحَقِّ‌ۚ ذَٲلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُرُوجِ ٤٢
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ يَسۡمَعُوۡنَ الصَّيۡحَةَ بِالۡحَـقِّ​ ؕ ذٰ لِكَ يَوۡمُ الۡخُـرُوۡجِ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: The Day they will hear the blast [of the Horn] in truth. That is the Day of Emergence [from the graves].
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yasmaoonas sai-hata bilhaqq zaalika yawmul khurooj

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ ٤٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّا نَحۡنُ نُحۡىٖ وَنُمِيۡتُ وَاِلَيۡنَا الۡمَصِيۡرُۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa Nahnu nuhyee Wa-numeetu Wa-ilainal maseer

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًا‌ۚ ذَٲلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌ ٤٤
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَ تَشَقَّقُ الۡاَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمۡ سِرَاعًا​ ؕ ذٰ لِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيۡرٌ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: On the Day the earth breaks away from them [and they emerge] rapidly; that is a gathering easy for Us.
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma tashaqqaqul ardu 'anhum siraa'aa; zaalika hashrun 'alainaa yaseer

ayahs.textUthmani: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ‌ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ‌ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ ٤٥
ayahs.textIndopak: نَحۡنُ اَعۡلَمُ بِمَا يَقُوۡلُوۡنَ​ وَمَاۤ اَنۡتَ عَلَيۡهِمۡ بِجَـبَّارٍ​ فَذَكِّرۡ بِالۡقُرۡاٰنِ مَنۡ يَّخَافُ وَعِيۡدِ‏
ayahs.translation: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur’ān whoever fears My threat.
ayahs.transliteration: Nahnu a'lamu bimaa yaqooloona Wa-maaa anta 'alaihim bijabbaarin fazakkir bil-quraani maien yakhaafu wa'eed
